act_name: Court Fees Act (as applicable to Delhi)
notes: Original Schedule I statutory fee table (Punjab Act 14 of 1958 as extended to Delhi). 2012 Delhi Amendment struck down (WP(C) 4770/2012). No max fee cap.
Schedule I with Maharashtra amendments. Min fee ₹50 up to ₹5000.

act_name: Karnataka Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act
notes: Section 23-26. Independent state act. Min fee ₹100 on first slab.

act_name: Tamil Nadu Court Fees and Suits Valuation Act
notes: Schedule I. Min fee ₹50 on first ₹5000.

notes: Independent state act. Schedule I.
